description: Legal resolution by the Karaite community regarding the issue of marriage before the completion of the betrothal period. Dated: 18 Adar I 5398 AM (1638 CE). Location: Cairo, inferred based on the venue (Dār Simḥa Synagogue). The community gathered in Dār Simḥa and collectively agreed "with regards to the betrothal deeds drawn up and taken upon themselves, to not marry their women during the period specified in the betrothal deeds and (to do so) only with the completion of the (betrothal) period that they committed to by written oath" (ll. 2-4). Some of the community members who gathered in Dār Simḥa, for whom this issue applies, then agree to void their betrothal deeds and to not make marital arrangements in venues outside of their communal legal system: "ושלא יצאו למשפט אחר להחליף משפטי התורה". The final lines detail how the community agrees to punish those who violate the agreement, via ḥerem ḥamūr with various stipulations. MCD.
description_he: החלטה משפטית של קהילת הקראים בדבר נישואין לפני תום תקופת האירוסין. תאריך: י"ח אדר א' 5398 = 1638 לספירה. מיקום: קהיר, דאר שמחה. הקהילה הסכימה לא לשאת נשים בתקופה הנקבעת בשטרות האירוסין, ולהעניש עוברים בחרם חמור.
